TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Frank_Baird, title = Frank_Baird, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Frank_Baird} }

S.FORM: Frank Baird sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1912, ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 4, Frank Baird, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2007) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Frank Baird sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1912, ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 4, Frank Baird, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2007) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *rank βair* s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *rank βair*, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
